title: IED Blast - Foot Patrol

details.line9: Flat field, North of tree line

story: A Marine triggered a pressure-plate IED. Left leg traumatic amputation. Tourniquet applied, bleeding controlled. Vitals: BP 90/60, HR 120.

title: Heat Stroke - Training Hike
story: Two Marines collapsed during a 10k ruck. Skin hot and dry, altered mental status. Temp 104.5F.

title: Fall from Height - Shipboard
story: Sailor fell 15 feet from a ladderwell. Suspected pelvic fracture. Signs of internal bleeding.

title: Sniper GSW - Hot LZ
story: Local national caught in crossfire. GSW to the abdomen. Evisceration noted. LZ is under active small arms fire.
